ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Peter Avdoulos and Attorney Marilyn A. Young to appear on Jan-23-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. The Order to Appear and related Status date will be taken off calendar if the requisite documents have been filed by Jan-13-2023.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
